title: Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple
tagline: Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple, Kerala

overview.short: The Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple is a Hindu temple located in Mayannur of Thrissur District of Kerala.
overview.description: The Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple is a Hindu temple located in Mayannur of Thrissur District of Kerala. The temple is dedicated to Goddess Sri Kurumba Bhagavathi.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Thrissur, locally known as JNV Mayannur, is a boarding, co-educational school in Thrissur district of Kerala state in India. Navodaya Vidyalayas are funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development and administered by Navodaya Vidyalaya Smiti, an autonomous body under the ministry.

topPlaces.name: Mannanur, Palakkad
topPlaces.description: Mannanur is a village on the banks of Bharathappuzha river in Palakkad district of Kerala state in India.

topPlaces.name: Mayannur
topPlaces.description: Mayannur is a village in Thrissur District in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Chunangad
topPlaces.description: Chunangad is a village near Ottapalam taluk of Palakkad district of Kerala State, India. The population consists of mainly Hindus & Muslims and very few Christian settlers.

topPlaces.name: Ottapalam
topPlaces.description: Ottapalam (also spelled Ottappalam) is a town, taluk, and municipality in the Palakkad District of Kerala, India. It is the administrative headquarters of Ottapalam taluk and is located approximately 34 km (21 mi) from the Palakkad (district HQ), along the banks of the Bharathapuzha River, the second-longest river in the state.

topPlaces.name: Puramathra
topPlaces.description: Puramathra is a village in Kulukkallur panchayath in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kulukkallur
topPlaces.description: Kulukkallur is a village and gram panchayat in Pattambi Taluk, Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Killimangalam
topPlaces.description: Killimangalam is a village in Chelakkara, Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Killimangalam and the nearby village of panjal has been the location for several Malayalam movies.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (73 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mayannur Kavu Sri Kurumba Bagavathy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Thrissur, Mannanur, Palakkad, Mayannur, Chunangad, Ottapalam.
